Availability.description: Availability classification; controls whether the event occupies time.

BusinessHoursRule.description: A wall-clock-local business-hours rule: [start, end) local time on the given ISO weekday.

start.description: Local wall-clock start "HH:MM" (inclusive); must be before end.

Constraints.description: Scheduling constraints; each unspecified field falls back to the resolved policy profile.

granularityMinutes.description: Slot start step within a free region; defaults to the duration.

DstPolicy.description: Explicit resolution for a nonexistent (spring-forward gap) and an ambiguous (fall-back overlap) wall time. Absence is an error, never a guess.

EventStatus.description: Event status. A cancelled event is a tombstone that occupies no time.

Instant.description: A UTC instant; the only instant representation.

Interval.description: A half-open interval [start, end) over instants. end must not precede start; a zero-length interval [t, t) denotes the empty set.

PolicyProfile.description: Named, versioned policy profile supplying scheduling defaults.

ResolvedEvent.description: A resolved event: an id with a half-open [start, end) instant interval and optional status/availability classification.

description: The primary scheduling primitive: given candidate windows, a meeting duration, known events, and constraints, return the ranked set of valid half-open [start, end) slots. `dstPolicy` is required when businessHours are given; `now` is required when the resolved minimum notice is greater than zero.

candidateWindows.description: Non-empty list of windows to search within.

dstPolicy.description: Required when businessHours are present (wall-clock resolution).

durationMinutes.description: Meeting length. Defaults to the resolved policy profile's value.

now.description: Required when the resolved minimum notice is greater than zero.

title: find_slots request
